race.comment: MOCKRIDGE (4) did little in two runs last time in, but they were in much tougher races than what he meets here. Has looked good in two jumpouts this time in, the latest when he went to the line with the smart Dollar Shot under a light ride. HOOK 'N' SPUR (8) got well back over 1200m at Caulfield Heath last time and never threatened. This doesn't look as hard so he can improve with the advantage of a good barrier. PRINCING (10) returned from a spell two weeks ago when he was beaten 3.5 lengths into fourth over 1200m at Pakenham. He'll be better for that and the step up to 1400m suits. SISTINE EXPRESS (14) didn't see where the winner, which was Concord Connie, went last start, but the fact she was tested there was a good pointer to the opinion the stable has and she draws to bounce back.
